leadText: Sparkly Swirl (Japanese: きらきらストーム Sparkly Storm) is a damage-dealing Fairy-type move introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. It is one of the signature moves of the partner Eevee.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VII [ edit | edit source ] Sparkly Swirl deals damage and cures the user, all Pokémon in the user's party, and the user's allies, of all non-volatile status conditions ( sleep , poison , paralysis , freeze , and burn ). Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Sparkly Swirl cannot be selected in a battle. However, it has been modified: its power was changed to 120, its accuracy to 85%, and its PP to 5.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E The user attacks the target by wrapping it with a whirlwind of an overpowering scent. This also heals all status conditions of the user's party. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.
